scripts.migrate: cd backend && uv --cache-dir ../.uv-cache run python -m scripts.migrate
scripts.backend: cd backend && uv --cache-dir ../.uv-cache run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --reload-dir app --reload-dir scripts --reload-dir migrations
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
scripts.dev:full: npm run db && npm run migrate && npm run dev
